_meta.author: scorecard-refine-national cron (Claude opus-4-7)
_meta.note: CA federal House continuation — CA-22 D primary field (post 2026-06-02 jungle primary) + CA-23 R incumbent. (1) Eric Garcia CA-22 D — LOST primary 2026-06-02 (eliminated, low-budget perennial Marine vet candidate, ~$613 raised vs $20,910 debt FEC C00766725, fourth bid for House; status→lost, candidacy_status→lost; thin record; only documented positions = pathway-to-citizenship/DREAMer protection HARD-FALSE border q1, renewable energy SOFT, water-contamination/Big-Ag-accountability SOFT, universal healthcare SOFT, ban private prisons SOFT — left iVoterGuide blank 2022, no abortion/marriage/2A platform); (2) Jasmeet Bains CA-22 D AD-35 Asm — STILL RUNNING but TRAILING for #2 slot (Villegas 29.8% / Bains 25.7% / Valadao 44.5% per CA SoS; race uncalled, candidacy_status remains primary_candidate); REAL Assembly record + CA-22 specific deviations: 75% Howard Jarvis Taxpayers (HARD-TRUE econ q2), lone-Legislature-D NO on ACA 8 / Prop 50 redistricting Aug 2025, lone-Assembly-D NO on Newsom oil price-gouging SBX 1-2 Apr 2023 (stripped of B&P chairmanship then reinstated), supported Prop 36 tough-on-crime 2024 — BUT NO break with D caucus on life/marriage/2A/family; PPAF 100% + endorsed (HARD-FALSE life q4) + EMILY's List + Equality CA (HARD-FALSE marriage q4) + DMFI PAC endorsed + $1.98M AIPAC/DMFI IE money TrackAIPAC (HARD-FALSE foreign_policy q3) + NRA-PVF F (HARD-FALSE self_def q0/q1); pro-Israel public stance + privately-genocide-then-publicly-walked-back; first Sikh-American/South-Asian-woman in CA Assembly, family physician at Adventist Health Delano, born Delano CA 1985; (3) Randy Villegas CA-22 D — LEADING for #2 slot (uncalled, ~1,300 vote margin with ~46% ballots outstanding); Bernie/AOC/DSA/WFP/CTA/UAW endorsed progressive-populist Visalia school board trustee + College of the Sequoias political-science professor + UCSC PhD; HARD-TRUE foreign_policy_restraint cluster (q0 'No More Endless Wars — Whether it's Iraq Afghanistan or Palestine' Issues page + q1 forever-wars/restraint platform + q3 zero AIPAC explicit ActBlue 'Randy Rejects AIPAC' fundraising vehicle + Jan 2024 Gaza ceasefire letter signatory + Common Dreams quote 'genocide in the affirmative'); HARD-TRUE industry_capture q2 (Big-Ag corporate-polluter accountability platform + Central Valley TCP/nitrate framing); HARD-FALSE marriage q4 (Mar 10 2026 VUSD board pro-LGBTQ statement re Redwood HS slur incident) + HARD-FALSE family q0 (CTA endorsed + universal-public-childcare + free public college platform) + HARD-FALSE family q2 (pro-ethnic-studies-as-graduation-requirement 2022 quote); no Issues-page section on life/marriage/2A — NULL those (Issues-page silence is honest evidence-absence not party-default); 1st-generation Mexican-American Bakersfield-raised UCSC PhD politics; (4) Rudy Salas CA-22 D — WITHDREW before 2026-06-02 primary (did NOT appear on ballot; status→former candidacy_status→not_running, 3rd attempt at CA-22 after losing to Valadao 2022 + 2024); 10-year Assembly record real: HARD-TRUE econ q2 (lone-Assembly-D NO on SB 1 gas tax 2017 — Speaker Rendon stripped him of Business & Professions chairmanship in retaliation) + HARD-TRUE christian_liberty q1 (lone-Assembly-D NO on AB 775 2015 Reproductive FACT Act compelled-speech against pregnancy crisis centers — conscience-protective vote) + HARD-FALSE industry_capture / oil-aligned (top oil-money recipient 2016 + authored AB 1299 to exempt Kern Oil from fenceline air-monitoring + CA Enviro Voters 12% 'lowest D' + Courage California 8-12); BUT 2026 platform explicitly pro-choice 'supported Prop 1' (HARD-FALSE life q0/q1/q4) + PPAF + RFFA endorsed + Equality California endorsed (HARD-FALSE marriage q4) + Giffords PAC endorsed both 2024+2026 (HARD-FALSE self_def q0/q1) + DMFI endorsed (HARD-FALSE foreign_policy q3) + KGET 2024 debate 'we need a pathway to citizenship' (HARD-FALSE border q1); Moderate Caucus chair fiscally-conservative business-friendly D; born Bakersfield 1977 Mexican-American UCLA BA history; (5) Jay Obernolte CA-23 R 3rd-term incumbent — Big Bear video-game-CEO/FarSight Studios + Caltech BS Engineering + UCLA MS Artificial Intelligence (NOT PhD; DPA Public Admin from California Baptist Univ 2020); **HARD-FALSE biblical_marriage cross-party deviation** YES on Respect for Marriage Act HR 8404 BOTH passages — July 19 2022 RC 373 (1 of 47 R YES) + Dec 8 2022 RC 513 (1 of 39 R YES) with explicit 'limited government' rationale; CAUCUS PROFILE: **Republican Governance Group** (Tuesday Group successor — explicit moderate-R caucus) + Main Street Caucus + RSC + **Chair Republican Policy Committee (April 15 2026 = formal House R leadership role)** + co-chair House AI Task Force with Ted Lieu; Heritage Action 119th 72% / lifetime 73% / ILA 71% / 65.82% lifetime ('9 points below R caucus 80% average') Tax & Fiscal 30% worst category — bottom-quartile-R Main-Street-pragmatist (same archetype as Valadao/Fong/Calvert/Y.Kim); HARD-TRUE life q4 (NARAL/RFA 0% 2024) + HARD-TRUE life q1 (SBA Pro-Life supported) + HARD-TRUE border q1 (Laken Riley HR 29 YES Jan 7 2025 RC 6) + HARD-TRUE self_def q0 (HR 38 Constitutional Concealed Carry Reciprocity 2025 cosponsor) + HARD-FALSE foreign_policy q3 (TrackAIPAC labels 'AIPAC Rep' Jul 26 2024) + NO on Trump 2nd impeachment Jan 13 2021 RC 17 'will only divide our nation further'; M5 Max OpenClaw fleet research limited by 403/redirect on OpenSecrets + clerk.house.gov direct CBDC vote — noted as evidence gap; Protestant 'Judeo-Christian values established a framework of morality which is necessary for our system of limited government' (Presidential Prayer Team 2022). **SKIPS this batch**: mike-thompson (11th defer — slug-collision blocker remains URGENT per Adam slug-rename to mike-thompson-ca-04); vacant-ca-14 (placeholder seat — Wahab/Hernandez advanced to Nov 3 special, no person to score).

set.office: U.S. Representative CA-22 (2026 D Candidate — LOST primary 2026-06-02 · disabled USMC Iraq veteran/therapist · 4th unsuccessful House bid 2020 IND/2022 CA-22 special/2022 CA-21/2026 CA-22)

profile.background: Eric Garcia, disabled U.S. Marine Corps veteran (enlisted 2005 at 17, deployed Iraq 2007, medically separated 2012). Born Fresno CA; resides Visalia/Tulare County area. BA 2017; pursuing masters in marriage-and-family therapy; works as a therapist. Registered Democrat after 2020 election (previously ran 2020 CA-22 as independent, 2.7%). FEC committee C00766725 reported only $613.17 raised against $20,910 in debt as of May 20 2026 — minimal-resource perennial candidate. Lost June 2 2026 jungle primary (vote total below the three named contenders, eliminated for Nov 3 general).

eric-garcia-ca-22.notes_set: PRIMARY ELIMINATED 2026-06-02 — finished outside top-three of CA-22 jungle primary; Valadao (R, 44.5%) and Villegas (D, 29.8%) or Bains (D, 25.7%) will advance to Nov 3 2026 general. Record left scoreable on documented platform positions only (Vote Smart Political Courage Test + campaign-site sweep); did NOT answer iVoterGuide questionnaire 2022 (zero responses on abortion/PP/marriage/2A axes). HARD-FALSE border q1 (Vote Smart PCT: 'will fight for a pathway to citizenship for the 11 million immigrants living in the United States without legal status, protect DREAMers, and streamline the visa and green card process'). HARD-FALSE industry_capture q3 (Vote Smart PCT: pro-renewable-energy 'switching to renewable energy and leaving dirty, costly fossil fuels in the past' — pro-USDA-EPA-regulation posture); SOFT-TRUE industry_capture q2 (Ballotpedia + Vote Smart: Central-Valley TCP-nitrate corporate-polluter accountability framing on water — Big-Ag-accountability deviation, but progressive-left framing not Christian-conservative). Issues-page silence on life/marriage/family/2A/election-integrity/foreign-policy — explicitly NULL those cells per evidence-first rubric (silence is silence, not party-default). NO AIPAC dollars on FEC ($0 PAC receipts as candidate too small to attract any). NOT an SBA / NRA / Heritage / FRC scoreable record.

1.note: Vote Smart PCT: 'will fight for a pathway to citizenship for the 11 million immigrants living in the United States without legal status, protect DREAMers, and streamline the visa and green card process' — direct opposite of mandatory deportation of all illegals including Dreamers. HARD.

2.note: Central-Valley TCP-nitrate water-contamination corporate-polluter platform: 'all the water in the valley is pretty much horrible … contaminated with nitrates and 1,2,3 TCP, a chemical from an agricultural product released in the 1950s' — anti-Big-Ag (legacy Shell/Dow pesticide) framing crosses party lines on agricultural-cartel accountability. SOFT-TRUE (left-populist framing, not Christian-conservative, but rubric-aligned direction).

3.note: Vote Smart PCT: 'switching to renewable energy and leaving dirty, costly fossil fuels in the past. Solar panels, wind turbines, tidal power' — implies pro-USDA-EPA-regulation framework opposite of opposing USDA/EPA overreach against family farms. SOFT.

set.office: U.S. Representative CA-22 (2026 D Primary Candidate · sitting CA Assemblymember AD-35 since Dec 2022 · physician/Adventist Health Delano · first Sikh-American/South-Asian-woman in CA Assembly)

profile.religion: Sikh (Punjabi Sikh immigrant family Delano CA; authored 2023 bill recognizing 1984 Sikh genocide)
profile.background: Jasmeet Kaur Bains, born July 2, 1985 in Delano, CA to Punjabi Sikh immigrants from India. B.S. Biology Illinois Institute of Technology (2006); M.D. American University of Antigua (2013); residency Clinica Sierra Vista Bakersfield 2015-2018. Family physician Adventist Health Delano; previously chief medical officer California Medical Assistance Team Central Valley. Elected CA Assembly AD-35 (Bakersfield/Delano/Wasco/Arvin/Shafter/McFarland — Kern County) Nov 2022 with 60% jungle defeating Dem Leticia Perez; re-elected Nov 2024 with 57% over R Robert Rosas. First South Asian American woman + first Sikh American elected to CA Assembly. Termed out of Assembly 2026. Launched CA-22 congressional campaign July 16, 2025 citing Valadao's OBBBA YES + Medi-Cal cuts. Heavy fentanyl record (4 authored bills + $11M secured for Kern County).

jasmeet-bains.notes_set: Race standing 2026-06-05: TRAILING for #2 slot (Villegas 29.8% / 12,234 leads Bains 25.7% / 10,529 with ~46% of ballots outstanding — uncalled by AP). Retains AD-35 seat through end of 2026 regardless of CA-22 outcome. SCORECARDS LOCATED: Planned Parenthood Affiliates CA 100% / CA Labor Federation 83% / CTA 85% / Howard Jarvis Taxpayers 75% (flag) / ACLU CA Action 45% / CA Environmental Voters 37% / Sierra Club CA 10% / Courage California 18% / NRA-PVF F. KEY ENDORSEMENTS: Planned Parenthood Action Fund + EMILY's List + Equality California + Democratic Majority for Israel PAC + 314 Action ($500K IE) + full labor stack. TrackAIPAC: $1,983,064 in Israel-lobby independent expenditures (DMFI + AIPAC passthrough vehicles incl Pro-Choice Majority + EDW Action Fund + 314 Action). NO SBA / NRA / CRPA / Heritage / FRC / CA Family Council / CA Pro-Life Council endorsement located. HARD-TRUE econ q2 deviation: Howard Jarvis Taxpayers 75% alignment unusually high for sitting Assembly D + Lone-Legislature-D NO on ACA 8 / Prop 50 redistricting (Aug 2025) + Lone-Assembly-D NO on SBX 1-2 Newsom oil price-gouging penalty Apr 2023 (Speaker Rendon stripped her of Business & Professions Committee, reinstated month later) + 'pause Governor's new gas tax' June 30 2025 press release + Only Assembly D against 2024 hospital private-equity acquisition-notice bill. HARD-FALSE life q4 (PPAF endorsed + EMILY's List endorsed + PPAF CA 100% scorecard + 'I am honored to stand with Planned Parenthood against Washington Republicans' war on women' May 2026 statement). HARD-FALSE marriage q4 (Equality California endorsed + co-authored SB 403 caste discrimination ban with Sen. Wahab). HARD-FALSE foreign_policy q3 ($1.98M AIPAC ecosystem IE + DMFI PAC endorsed + 'I believe in Israel's right to exist, defend itself and live in peace as a secure nation' + privately-said-genocide-then-publicly-walked-back per Politico). HARD-FALSE self_def q0/q1 (NRA-PVF F grade). SOFT-FALSE border q1 (April 2025 'completely offended' by R Medi-Cal-for-undocumented cuts — favorable posture toward undocumented residents). NO PUBLIC POSITION located on life-at-conception/abolition/IVF/euthanasia/marriage-definition/RFMA/biological-sex/AB-1955-parental-notification/CRT/school-choice/CBDC/Fed-audit/balanced-budget/voter-ID/SAVE-Act/paper-ballots/border-barrier/E-Verify/birthright/constitutional-carry/red-flag/AWB/Article-I-WPR/Iran/Yemen/AUMF/WHO/NCVIA/PREP/raw-milk/Pentagon-audit — NULL those per evidence-first rubric. As a physician who ran a MAT clinic she has NOT taken a public anti-pharma-mandate stance; silence is silence — NULL on industry_capture q0. ROSTER VERIFIED.

4.note: Endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund (May 2026) + EMILY's List + Planned Parenthood Affiliates of California 100% scorecard alignment + 'I am honored to stand with Planned Parenthood against Washington Republicans' war on women' (May 2026 campaign statement). Opposite of never accepting PP/NARAL/EMILY/abortion-industry PAC. HARD.

Endorsed by Equality California 2026 + co-authored SB 403 caste-discrimination ban (Sen. Wahab) — civil-rights-identity-protection alignment. Opposite of opposing LGBTQ+ promotion in public policy. HARD.

2.note: Howard Jarvis Taxpayers Association 75% alignment (unusually high for sitting Assembly D) + Lone-Legislature-D NO on ACA 8 / Prop 50 redistricting Aug 2025 + Lone-Assembly-D NO on SBX 1-2 Newsom oil price-gouging Apr 2023 (Speaker Rendon stripped of B&P Committee, reinstated month later) + Only Assembly D against 2024 hospital private-equity notice bill + 'pause Governor's new gas tax' press release June 30 2025. Pattern of anti-tax/anti-deficit-spending Central-Valley-D restraint. HARD-TRUE cross-party deviation on fiscal restraint.

0.note: NRA Political Victory Fund 'F' grade — opposite of supporting constitutional carry without permit. HARD.

1.note: NRA-PVF F grade as sitting D Assemblymember in 2022/2024 cycles — pattern of supporting CA-Legislature gun-control bills (red-flag, mag-limits, AWB). HARD.

April 2025: 'completely offended' by R proposals to cut Medi-Cal for undocumented immigrants; 'the idea that covering undocumented healthcare will increase healthcare costs is a completely nonsensical argument' — pro-undocumented-services posture opposite of mandatory deportation. SOFT.

3.note: TrackAIPAC: $1,983,064 cumulative Israel-lobby independent expenditures (DMFI + AIPAC-passthrough vehicles incl Pro-Choice Majority + EDW Action Fund + 314 Action). Direct DMFI PAC endorsement Feb 2026. Public 'I believe in Israel's right to exist, defend itself and live in peace as a secure nation' + privately-said-Gaza-genocide-then-publicly-walked-back per Politico. Opposite of never accepting AIPAC/foreign-linked PAC. HARD.

set.office: U.S. Representative CA-22 (2026 D Primary Candidate · Visalia Unified School Board trustee Area 6 since Dec 2021 · College of the Sequoias political-science professor · UCSC PhD politics · Bernie/AOC/DSA-aligned progressive)

profile.background: Randy Villegas, born c.1995 Bakersfield CA to Mexican immigrants; first in family to earn a college degree. AA Bakersfield College; BA political science/history CSU Bakersfield; PhD Politics UC Santa Cruz (UAW grad-student union member, participated in COLA strikes). Political science professor College of the Sequoias (Visalia); trustee Area 6 Visalia Unified School District (appointed Dec 9 2021 by 4-1 board vote, elected Nov 2022). Co-owns family auto shop in Bakersfield. 2025 American Political Science Association Community College Faculty Award. Older brother Angel is DACA recipient. No-corporate-PACs progressive-populist platform.

randy-villegas.notes_set: Race standing 2026-06-05: LEADING for #2 slot (29.8% / 12,234 vs Bains 25.7% / 10,529 — ~1,300-vote margin, uncalled by AP, ~46% ballots outstanding). KEY ENDORSEMENTS: Bernie Sanders (Nov 2025) + Ro Khanna + Pramila Jayapal + Dolores Huerta + CA DSA + Working Families Party + UAW + CTA + Indivisible + Congressional Progressive Caucus PAC + Our Revolution + Leaders We Deserve (David Hogg) + BOLD PAC. NOT endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund (PPAF endorsed Bains instead) — left abortion position unstated on Issues page. FEC H6CA22190: zero AIPAC/DMFI PAC money + 94.4% individual donors + only 5.6% PAC share of $1.75M raised. HARD-TRUE foreign_policy_restraint cross-cluster (q0+q1+q3): Issues page Foreign Policy 'No More Endless Wars — Whether it's Iraq, Afghanistan, or Palestine — Americans are sick of endless wars' + 'when it comes to war or bailing out other countries, we must get our priorities straight' + ActBlue 'Randy Rejects AIPAC' explicit fundraising vehicle (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/randy-rejects-aipac) + Jan 2024 Gaza ceasefire letter signatory + Common Dreams quote affirming Gaza-as-genocide. HARD-TRUE industry_capture q2 (Issues page Environment 'corporate polluters … gas leaks, air pollution, water contamination… I will fight to hold corporate polluters accountable' + Issues page Jobs 'Break up monopolies … No corporations should be allowed to become large enough to control an entire sector' — Big-Ag/anti-trust framing, Central-Valley-specific). HARD-FALSE marriage q4 (Mar 10 2026 VUSD board pro-LGBTQ statement re Redwood HS homophobic-slur photo: 'We must fight for the dignity, and the safety, of all of our LGBTQ students, all of our staff, and our community here in Visalia and beyond'). HARD-FALSE family q0 (CTA endorsed + universal-childcare/free-public-college/'raise wages for teachers/custodians/nutritional/bus drivers as VUSD trustee' platform — opposite of universal school choice). HARD-FALSE family q2 (2022 quote: 'I'm really excited about the opportunity to expand courses like ethnic studies and make it a graduation requirement' — pro-ethnic-studies-as-graduation-requirement = pro-CRT-curriculum-mandate). HARD-FALSE econ q4 (Issues page: 'Tax the top 1% of income earners and wealth holders' + 'End corporate ownership of single-family homes' + Medicare for All + price caps on drugs — explicit redistributionist progressive economics opposite of opposing WEF/ESG/anti-monopoly direction, though the SAME anti-monopoly direction TRUE-aligns on industry_capture q2). NO Issues-page section on life/marriage/2A/election-integrity/IVF/AB-1955/AB-775/CBDC/Fed-audit/balanced-budget/voter-ID/SAVE-Act/border-barrier/E-Verify/birthright/constitutional-carry/red-flag/AWB/NFA/Iran-WPR/AUMF/WHO/NCVIA/PREP/raw-milk/Pentagon-audit — NULL per evidence-first rubric (Issues-page silence is honest evidence-absence; he is letting endorsers signal positions rather than stating them himself). ATTACK-AD CONTEXT (Fox News May 12 2026): unanimous VUSD-board votes approved ~$14.4M in confidential sex-abuse settlements with NDA clauses — Villegas was present + voting on the unanimous-board; campaign declined to respond. Cite-only context, NOT a clean rubric cell. ROSTER VERIFIED.

4.note: VUSD board March 10 2026 re Redwood HS homophobic-slur photo: 'No child should show up to their place of learning and be confronted with hate at them – directed at them just for being who they are. We must fight for the dignity, and the safety, of all of our LGBTQ students, all of our staff, and our community here in Visalia and beyond' — explicit pro-LGBTQ-promotion-in-schools-and-community advocacy from the dais. HARD.

0.note: California Teachers Association endorsed (teachers union, structural opponent of voucher/ESA movement) + Issues page Education touts 'universal higher education and trade schools' (free public college) + raised wages for VUSD teachers/custodians/bus drivers — public-school-funding-prioritization platform opposite of universal school choice / homeschool freedom / opposing compulsory public-school attendance. HARD.

2.note: 2022 statement on running for VUSD board: 'I'm really excited about the opportunity to expand courses like ethnic studies and make it a graduation requirement' — pro-ethnic-studies-graduation-requirement (CRT-derived curriculum mandate) + DSA-CA voter guide endorses 'DSA-aligned policies' incl ethnic-studies expansion. Opposite of opposing CRT/SOGI/comprehensive sex-ed/gender-ideology curricula in K-12. HARD.

4.note: Issues page Jobs: 'Tax the top 1% of income earners and wealth holders' + Housing: 'End corporate ownership of single-family homes' — redistributionist progressive-populist economics. While the anti-monopoly direction aligns on industry_capture q2, the wealth-tax/state-housing-program framing aligns with WEF/ESG redistributionist economic agenda the rubric q4 opposes. SOFT-FALSE (rubric tension; flag as inferential).

0.note: Issues page Foreign Policy explicit: 'No More Endless Wars — Whether it's Iraq, Afghanistan, or Palestine — Americans are sick of endless wars… restoring our place in the world as a leader of peace.' Direct Article-I-restraint posture grouping Palestine with prior forever-wars. HARD-TRUE cross-party deviation on war powers.

1.note: Issues page Foreign Policy: 'when it comes to war or bailing out other countries, we must get our priorities straight and invest in our own communities, people, and country' — explicit forever-wars withdrawal framing + 'No More Endless Wars' platform. HARD.

3.note: Explicit anti-AIPAC fundraising vehicle ActBlue 'Randy Rejects AIPAC' (campaign-operated URL stating 'REJECTING support from AIPAC and the Israel lobby') + FEC H6CA22190 shows zero AIPAC/DMFI PAC dollars (94.4% individual donors, only 5.6% from any PAC, $1.75M total raised) + Jan 2024 Gaza ceasefire letter signatory + Common Dreams: 'joined human rights organizations… in answering [genocide] in the affirmative.' HARD-TRUE cross-party deviation on foreign-PAC refusal.

2.note: Issues page Environment: 'corporate polluters … gas leaks, air pollution and water contamination… I will fight to hold corporate polluters accountable' + Issues page Jobs: 'Break up monopolies and fight for small businesses … No corporations should be allowed to become large enough to control an entire sector' — direct anti-Big-Ag/anti-trust framing (CA-22 is heavily ag — Visalia/Tulare/Kern). HARD.

set.office: U.S. Representative CA-22 candidate (2026 D Primary · WITHDREW before 2026-06-02 ballot · 5-term former CA Assemblymember AD-32 Dec 2012-Dec 2022 · Moderate Caucus chair · 2022+2024 D nominee lost both to Valadao)

profile.background: Rodolfo 'Rudy' Salas Jr., born March 12, 1977 in Bakersfield, CA; Mexican-American Central Valley farm-labor family ('worked his way from laboring in the fields with his father'). UCLA BA history/political science (2000). One year as VP Al Gore WH staffer; CSU Bakersfield Upward Bound counselor; district director for State Sen. Dean Florez 2004-2010. Bakersfield City Council Nov 2010 (first Latino in 112-year council history). CA Assembly AD-32 Dec 3 2012 – Dec 5 2022 (5 terms; Moderate Caucus leader; Business & Professions Committee chair until stripped April 2017 in retaliation for SB 1 gas-tax NO vote per Bakersfield Now + CA Political Review). Lost CA-22 to David Valadao 51.5%-48.5% (2022) and 53.4%-46.6% (2024). Filed FEC paperwork for 2026 3rd attempt + listed by Ballotpedia News Mar 9 2026 + endorsements page rudysalas.com/endorsements live — but DID NOT APPEAR on the June 2 2026 jungle primary ballot (CA SoS results show only Valadao, Bains, Villegas, Garcia, and one minor candidate). No public withdrawal-statement located in this research pass; CSO believed to have backed Bains instead.

rudy-salas.notes_set: WITHDREW from 2026 CA-22 D primary before 2026-06-02 ballot — DID NOT APPEAR on certified jungle-primary ballot per CA SoS results page. 2026 campaign infrastructure (rudysalas.com + endorsements list) remained live without withdrawal banner at fetch time; no public withdrawal-statement located. Scoring based on 10-year Assembly voting record + 2024-2026 campaign positions on issues he documented. KEY 2026 ENDORSEMENTS: Reproductive Freedom for All (formerly NARAL) + Planned Parenthood Action Fund + Equality California + Democratic Majority for Israel PAC + Giffords PAC (both 2024 + 2026) + MoveOn + End Citizens United + United Farm Workers + SEIU + Building Trades + CA Labor Federation. HARD-FALSE life q0/q1/q4 (2026 priorities page rudysalas.com/priorities: 'government shouldn't interfere in a woman's healthcare decisions' + 'Supported Proposition 1 to protect reproductive rights' + 'Opposes abortion criminalization' + RFA + PPAF endorsed). HARD-TRUE christian_liberty q1 cross-party-deviation (2015 lone-Assembly-D NO on AB 775 Reproductive FACT Act compelled-speech against pregnancy crisis centers — conscience-protective vote against speech mandate on faith-based medical providers; per pregnancyhelpnews + CalMatters DigDem). HARD-FALSE marriage q4 (Equality California endorsed 2026). HARD-TRUE econ q2 cross-party-deviation (2017 lone-Assembly-D NO on SB 1 gas-tax/vehicle-fee increase + Speaker Rendon stripped him of Business & Professions Committee chairmanship in retaliation April 2017 per Bakersfield Now + CA Political Review + Courthouse News; founding member Assembly Moderate Caucus 'fiscally conservative and middle of the road business-friendly' bloc; Greater Bakersfield Chamber BAKPAC endorsement 2020). HARD-FALSE self_def q0/q1 (Giffords PAC endorsed 2024 + 2026 explicitly 'advocate for commonsense gun safety legislation to expand background checks to all gun sales'; pro-gun-control Democrat). HARD-FALSE border q1 (KGET Oct 2024 debate: 'We need a pathway to citizenship'). HARD-FALSE foreign_policy q3 (Democratic Majority for Israel PAC endorsed 2026). HARD-FALSE industry_capture q3 (CA Environmental Voters 12% 'lowest-scoring D in entire CA Legislature' 2021 + Sierra Club CA F-minus 47% lifetime + Courage California 8-12 / 100 + top oil-industry-gift recipient 2016 + authored AB 1299 in 2019 to exempt Kern Oil & Refining from fenceline air-monitoring rules — pro-oil-industry-regulation-evasion). 2026 campaign deck = full establishment-D + reproductive + LGBTQ + pro-Israel + Giffords alignment; moderation was on tax/regulation/oil axes NOT on social/cultural axes — fiscal-not-cultural deviation Central-Valley-D archetype. NO public position located on IVF/euthanasia/marriage definition/biological-sex/SB-132/SB-107/AB-1314/CBDC/Fed-audit/balanced-budget/voter-ID/SAVE-Act/SB-54-sanctuary-final-vote/E-Verify/birthright/constitutional-carry/NFA/Iran-WPR/AUMF/WHO/NCVIA/PREP/raw-milk/Pentagon-audit — NULL per evidence-first rubric. Withdrawal date + reason are evidence gaps; status set to former because no longer holding office and no longer on any 2026 ballot.

0.note: 2026 priorities page: 'government shouldn't interfere in a woman's healthcare decisions' + 'Supported Proposition 1 to protect reproductive rights' + 'Opposes abortion criminalization' — explicit pro-Roe constitutional-right framing. Opposite of affirming life-at-conception personhood. HARD.

1.note: 2026 priorities page: 'Opposes abortion criminalization' + Supports Prop 1; endorsed by Reproductive Freedom for All (NARAL successor) + Planned Parenthood Action Fund 2026. Opposite of voting for / advocating abortion abolition. HARD.

4.note: 2026 endorsements include Reproductive Freedom for All + Planned Parenthood Action Fund — abortion-industry PAC alignment. Opposite of never accepting PP/NARAL/EMILY money. HARD.
2026 endorsements include Equality California — opposite of opposing LGBTQ+ promotion in public policy. HARD.

1.note: 2015 lone-Assembly-Democrat NO vote on AB 775 Reproductive FACT Act (compelled-speech mandate requiring pregnancy crisis centers to post abortion-access notices — later struck down by SCOTUS in NIFLA v. Becerra 2018). HARD-TRUE conscience-exemption vote for faith-based medical providers / business owners; the most-anomalous social-issue vote in his 10-year Assembly record. CROSS-PARTY DEVIATION.

2.note: 2017 lone-Assembly-Democrat NO on SB 1 gas-tax/vehicle-fee increase + Speaker Rendon stripped him of Business & Professions Committee chairmanship in retaliation April 2017 (per Bakersfield Now + Courthouse News + CA Political Review) + leader of Assembly Moderate Caucus ('fiscally conservative and middle of the road business-friendly D' bloc per Berkeley belonging.center) + Greater Bakersfield Chamber BAKPAC endorsement 2020. HARD-TRUE cross-party deviation on tax/deficit restraint.

1.note: KGET Oct 2024 debate: 'We need a pathway to citizenship' + blamed Rs for blocking 'the immigration border deal'. Opposite of mandatory deportation. HARD.

0.note: Endorsed by Giffords PAC 2024 + 2026 explicitly to 'advocate for commonsense gun safety legislation to expand background checks to all gun sales' — opposite of supporting constitutional carry without permit. HARD.

profile.background: Jay Phillip Obernolte, born Aug 18 1970 Chicago IL; raised Fresno CA; resident Big Bear Lake CA since 1997. BS Engineering & Applied Science Caltech (1992); MS Artificial Intelligence UCLA (1997 — note: this is an MS not a PhD per Wikipedia + House bio); DPA Public Administration California Baptist University (2020). Founded FarSight Studios 1990 (family-friendly video games ~25 employees, still owner/president/technical director). Married Heather Obernolte 1996, two sons (Hale + Troy). Big Bear Lake City Council 2010 then Mayor. CA Assembly AD-33 Dec 1 2014 – Nov 30 2020. U.S. House since Jan 3 2021 (CA-08 in 117th, CA-23 from 118th). 119th committees + caucuses: Republican Study Committee + Republican Governance Group (Tuesday Group successor — explicit moderate-R caucus) + Main Street Caucus + Congressional Western Caucus + co-chair House Artificial Intelligence Task Force (with Ted Lieu D, 2024) + Chair House Republican Policy Committee (assumed April 15 2026 — formal House R leadership role). NOT in Freedom Caucus.
